title: Rules For Monarchs.
content:
If men are never their thoughts to employ,
    Take care to provide them a life full of joy;
    But if to some profit and use thou wouldst bend them,
    Take care to shear them, and then defend them.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, titled "Rules For Monarchs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
